training_status: active lifter (heavy bench press), reduced gym activity during cycle

benefits.description: Some results noticed after about a week of use with BPC and TB500 stack for shoulder injury.

protocol_notes: Previously tried a combo vial of BPC and TB500 (5mg each, 10mg total) with no results, attributed to underdosing. Switched to separate vials. Injecting BPC into shoulder (localized). Laid off gym during cycle, no heavy chest work. Ordered more after initial results. Source mentioned as Peptide Warehouse (BOGO sale).
